response.justification: Exceptionally strong technical credentials with proven expertise in architecture, team leadership, and open-source technologies. Current role at re:cinq (consulting firm) demonstrates ideal career trajectory. Critical blocker: German language proficiency listed as "Basic" versus required minimum C1 level. Security, compliance, and UML expertise also not explicitly demonstrated. Technical fit is excellent; language requirement barrier requires clarification before proceeding.
strengths: 15+ years building complex systems across web, mobile, embedded platforms with demonstrated architectural and team leadership experience
Active open-source contributor and community educator (GISCollective, workshops, FOSS4G talks) showing commitment to knowledge sharing and digital sovereignty
Currently employed at re:cinq as Staff Software Engineer, proving fit for consulting-focused technology leadership in similar environment
concerns: German language proficiency listed as "Basic" but role requires C1 minimum—critical gap for client interaction and team communication in German market
No explicit UML/formal modeling expertise mentioned despite being listed as ideal proficiency for the role
Security, risk management, and compliance knowledge not demonstrated in resume despite being required qualifications
